records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So who's this "client," anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My grandma goes to church, you know. Guys like that ruin the reputation of real believers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So why would a creep like that pay us a fortune to do this kind of job?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try to understand lunatics.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try to understand lunatics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember when Magellan's Prediction Society paid the boss big money to capture a C.O. alive? Turned out they were trying to tame it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want anything to do with that sort. Handing that thing over nearly got us killed when it went berserk in the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like you requested, no electronic devices. We drew the map by hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every CCTV location, police patrol routes, even the back alleys used by black-market dealers. It's all marked out by sector.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you rummaging around for snacks again and knocked it over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The other bottles on the same shelf are fine except this one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If storage wasn't the issue, then there's only one answer.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's made from grapes... that can't endure being near energy they dislike...

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm heading to a winery across the sea. I need to restock my shelves as much as what was broken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe sometime before the world ends.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe sometime before the world ends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. That's not funny.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll be leaving our little majesty in your care for a while, Nicole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I'll take good care of her, like always.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I'll take good care of her, like always.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'll take good care of her, like always.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because I know our little majesty's fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because I know our little majesty's fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I know our little majesty's fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So don't worry too much either, Nicole. No matter what happens, she'll be safe.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

records.m_Talk_DEU: A grand-opening massage shop coupon I got a while back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A grand-opening massage shop coupon I got a while back.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. It sounds strange when you put it that way, but for working adults, there's no better refuge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nooo! This was the bottle of wine Gremory brought back from her trip!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Were you rummaging around for snacks again and knocked it over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... So the wine I brought back had already spoiled?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If storage wasn't the issue, then there's only one answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm heading to a winery across the sea. I need to restock my shelves as much as what was broken.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm heading to a winery across the sea. I need to restock my shelves as much as what was broken.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'll take good care of her, like always.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She'll be safe anyway, so I'm not particularly worried.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She gets into trouble the moment I look away, yet you never worry at all.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I know our little majesty's fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So don't worry too much either, Nicole. No matter what happens, she'll be safe.

root.m_Talk_FRA: W-work on my body?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: A complete stranger's body?! And you have to go there yourself?! You're teasing me, right?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. It sounds strange when you put it that way, but for working adults, there's no better refuge.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. It sounds strange when you put it that way, but for working adults, there's no better refuge.
